hook.name: RwagmiHookV2
hook.description: RWAGMI Hook V2 is a Uniswap v4 launch hook for Base B20 Asset/WETH pools. It gates pool initialization so pools are created only through the RWAGMI launcher, supports optional dynamic LP fee overrides, and runs a mandatory launch-auction module during the first swaps to redirect early launch MEV into the pool's locker/reward split. After the auction window ends, swaps continue normally through the v4 pool.
